description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a spacious, landscaped yard featuring green lawns, palm trees, and a swimming pool. The front facade includes a driveway with a blue car parked and a gated entrance, while the rear and side yards are equipped with outdoor seating, garden beds, and decorative elements. Large windows line the exterior walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior living spaces. The building is constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some brick accents visible on the garage. The property is enclosed by a dark perimeter fence, providing privacy and security. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front of the bungalow, showing the driveway with a blue car, the main entrance, and the expansive front lawn with a pool and outdoor seating.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the garden area, palm trees, and the arrangement of outdoor furniture, with the house's side wall and windows visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backyard, additional green space, and the back facade of the bungalow, with more windows and a clear view of the garage and driveway.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the garage with two cars, the side entrance, and the pool area, as well as the boundary fence and landscaping.
